name: Squat Reach
overview: A dynamic squat variation that adds an overhead reach to increase mobility and coordination.
instructions: Keep feet shoulder-width apart and chest upright throughout.
Push hips back and bend knees to lower into the squat.
As you stand, extend hips fully and reach both arms overhead.

name: Jumping Squats
overview: A plyometric squat designed to develop explosive leg power.
instructions: Start with feet shoulder-width apart and lower into a controlled squat.
Drive through your heels and jump explosively upward.
Land softly with bent knees and flow straight into the next squat.

name: Squat Kicks
overview: A dynamic lower body movement combining squats and alternating kicks.
instructions: Lower into a squat with feet shoulder-width apart and core tight.
As you rise, extend one leg forward in a controlled kick.
Return the foot down and alternate legs with each rep.

name: Burpee Jump
overview: A high intensity full body conditioning movement combining squat plank and jump.
instructions: Drop into a squat, place hands on the floor, and kick feet back to plank.
Return feet to hands quickly and keep your core tight throughout.
Jump explosively upward and reach arms overhead to complete the rep.

name: Push Ups
overview: A classic upper body strength exercise using bodyweight resistance.
instructions: Keep hands slightly wider than shoulders and body in a straight line.
Lower chest toward the floor with elbows bending in a controlled manner.
Push through palms to return to start without letting hips sag.

name: T Plank
overview: A plank variation that introduces rotation and shoulder stability work.
instructions: Start in a solid plank with hands under shoulders and body aligned.
Rotate torso to one side and lift one arm toward the ceiling.
Hold briefly, return to plank, and alternate sides with control.

name: Lunges
overview: A foundational lower body exercise focused on unilateral leg strength.
instructions: Step forward and lower hips until both knees are at right angles.
Keep torso upright and front knee aligned over the foot.
Push through the front heel to return to standing then alternate legs.

name: Mountain Climbers
overview: A fast paced core and cardio exercise performed from a plank position.
instructions: Hold a strong high plank with hands directly under shoulders.
Drive one knee toward the chest while the other leg stays extended.
Switch legs quickly in a running motion without letting hips rise.

name: Jumping Jacks
overview: A classic aerobic exercise often used during warm ups.
instructions: Start with feet together and arms by your sides.
Jump feet outward while raising arms overhead in a wide arc.
Jump back to start and keep a steady rhythmic pace throughout.

name: Walking Hip Opener
overview: A dynamic warm-up exercise where the hip is lifted and externally rotated while walking to improve mobility.
instructions: Step forward and lift the knee toward the chest as you walk.
Rotate the lifted leg outward to open the hip with torso tall.
Place the foot down and repeat the same movement with the opposite leg.

name: Split Jump
overview: A plyometric lower body exercise where the athlete jumps from a split lunge and switches legs midair.
instructions: Begin in a lunge with torso upright and core engaged.
Jump explosively and switch leg positions in midair.
Land softly in the opposite lunge with bent knees and immediately reset.

name: Press Up Position Toe Tap
overview: A plank variation where one foot taps outward to challenge stability and core control.
instructions: Start in a high plank with hands directly under shoulders.
Lift one foot and tap it out to the side keeping hips stable.
Return foot to start and alternate sides while maintaining plank form.

name: Box Jump
overview: A plyometric lower body exercise where the athlete jumps from the ground onto an elevated surface.
instructions: Stand facing the box with feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend knees, swing arms back, and jump explosively onto the platform.
Land softly with bent knees then step down carefully before repeating.

name: Cobra Stretch
overview: A floor based spinal extension stretch commonly used in yoga and mobility routines.
instructions: Lie face down with legs extended and palms placed under shoulders.
Press through hands to lift the chest while keeping hips on the floor.
Hold the stretch briefly then lower torso back down with control.

name: Punches
overview: A simple cardio exercise inspired by boxing movements performed without equipment.
instructions: Keep knees slightly bent, core engaged, and stance stable.
Extend one arm forward with a slight torso rotation for power.
Quickly retract and alternate arms in a steady controlled rhythm.

name: Wide Arm Push Up
overview: A push-up variation where the hands are positioned wider to emphasize chest activation.
instructions: Place hands wider than shoulders and keep body in a straight line.
Lower chest toward the floor with elbows flaring slightly outward.
Push through palms to return to start while keeping core tight.

name: Shoulder Stretch
overview: A simple upper body stretch that targets the shoulder muscles and improves joint mobility.
instructions: Extend one arm straight across the chest at shoulder height.
Use the opposite hand to gently pull the arm closer to the body.
Keep the shoulder relaxed, hold briefly, then switch arms.

name: Seated Abs Circles
overview: A seated core stability exercise where the legs move in circular patterns to engage abdominal muscles.
instructions: Sit with knees bent, feet lifted, and torso slightly leaned back.
Engage the core and move knees together in a circular motion.
Keep core tight throughout and reverse the direction after several reps.

name: Inchworm
overview: A dynamic mobility exercise that transitions from standing to plank by walking the hands forward.
instructions: Bend forward from standing and place hands flat on the floor.
Walk hands forward until body reaches a high plank with core engaged.
Walk feet toward hands with legs relatively straight then return to standing.

name: Reverse Crunches
overview: A core focused abdominal exercise where the hips lift off the floor to target the lower abdominals.
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet lifted off the floor.
Curl hips upward lifting knees toward the chest using core strength only.
Lower hips slowly with control and avoid using momentum.

name: Step Up on Chair
overview: A functional lower body exercise where the body steps onto an elevated surface using leg strength.
instructions: Place one foot firmly on the chair and stand upright with core engaged.
Push through the heel to lift your body until the leg is fully extended.
Step down with control and alternate legs each rep.

name: Glute Bridge
overview: A bodyweight exercise that strengthens the glutes and posterior chain by lifting the hips from a supine position.
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Press through heels and lift hips until body forms a straight line.
Squeeze glutes at the top then lower slowly and repeat with control.

name: Plank Shoulder Tap
overview: A core stability exercise performed in a plank position while alternating shoulder taps to challenge balance and anti-rotation control.
instructions: Hold a high plank with feet slightly wider apart for stability.
Lift one hand and tap the opposite shoulder while keeping hips still.
Return hand to floor and alternate sides in a controlled manner.

name: High Knees
overview: A standing cardio exercise where alternating knees are driven upward rapidly to simulate running in place.
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart and keep your core tight throughout.
Drive one knee up toward the chest and pump the opposite arm simultaneously.
Switch legs quickly in a running motion without letting your posture drop.

name: Bird Dog
overview: A floor-based stability exercise where opposite arm and leg are extended simultaneously to challenge core control and balance.
instructions: Start on all fours with hands under shoulders, knees under hips and back flat.
Extend one arm forward and the opposite leg back while keeping hips level and core tight.
Hold briefly, return to start and repeat on the other side with control.
